name: em-sdd
description: Spec-Driven Development (SDD) workflow orchestrator. Walks a feature through create-spec → create-plan → verify-plan → implement → check → verify, tracking progress in sdd.yaml. Includes /em-sdd:sdd.status, /em-sdd:sdd.update-spec, and /em-sdd:sdd.remove-feature for inspection, spec changes, and feature removal.
